now_online: 🟢 You are now Online. You will receive ride requests.
now_offline: 🔴 You are now Offline. You won't receive orders.
enter_name: 📌 Full name Enter your full name exactly as in your passport, in English. Example: John Lennon
invalid_name: ❌ Please enter first and last name in English
enter_dob: 📅 Date of birth Enter your date of birth: Format: YYYY-MM-DD Example: 1990-05-21
enter_car: 🚘 Car model Enter your car model in English. Example: Toyota Camry
enter_color: 🎨 Car color Enter your car color in English. Example: White, Black, Red, Silver
enter_plate: 🔢 License plate Enter your license plate number. Example: BK 271
send_car_photo: 📸 Car photo Send a clear photo of your car.
send_passport: 🪪 Step 1 of 2 — Passport Please send a clear photo of your passport. 📋 Make sure: • Your full name is visible • Photo is not blurry • All corners are visible
send_license: 🪪 Step 2 of 2 — Driver's License Please send a clear photo of your driver's license. 📋 Make sure: • Your name and license number are visible • Photo is not blurry • Both sides if needed
waiting_approval: ⏳ Application submitted! Your documents are under review. We'll notify you within 24 hours. 📋 Submitted: ✅ Personal info ✅ Car details ✅ Car photo ✅ Passport ✅ Driver's license
approved: ✅ Approved! You can now go online and receive orders.
rejected:
❌ Your application was not approved.

Contact @tvunp for more info.
offline_missed: 💤 You missed a ride! A client ordered while you were offline. Go online to receive orders! 👆
stop_live: 🔴 Trip finished! Please stop sharing your Live Location.
